---
title: "Under-5 child mortality (compartimento) — DEMOPAST (test)"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>

<div style="background:#fff3cd;border:1px solid #ffeeba;border-radius:4px;padding:0.5rem 1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:0.9rem;">
  <strong>Test section</strong> — under-5 mortality rate (u5mr, deaths age 0–4
  per 1,000 live births) by <em>compartimento</em> (historical region), annual
  benchmarks 1890–1936. The map colours each region by its u5mr.
  <a href="index.html">← back to test home</a>
</div>

<div class="slider-container">
  <label for="yearSlider" class="year-label">Year: <span id="yearDisplay">—</span></label><br>
  <input type="range" id="yearSlider" min="0" max="0" step="1" value="0" style="width:70%;max-width:640px;">
  <div id="yearTicks" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;font-size:0.7rem;color:#888;"></div>
</div>

<div style="text-align:center;margin:0.75rem 0;">
  <span style="font-size:0.95rem;color:#555;">Map shows the under-5 mortality
  rate (deaths 0–4 per 1,000 live births) by compartimento</span>
</div>

<div style="display:flex;gap:1.5rem;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap;">
  <div style="flex:0 0 48%;min-width:340px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.75rem;">
    <div id="map" style="width:100%;height:600px;"></div>
    <div id="legendWrapper">
      <div class="legend-header">
        <span class="legend-title">Legend</span>
        <button id="legendToggle" type="button">Hide</button>
      </div>
      <div id="legendContent" class="map-legend"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="compInfo" style="flex:1 1 45%;min-width:320px;padding:1rem;background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:4px;max-height:900px;overflow-y:auto;">
    <h4 id="compName" style="margin-top:0;"></h4>
    <table id="compTable" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:0.75rem;"></table>
    <h5 style="margin-bottom:0.25rem;">u5mr time series</h5>
    <p id="seriesNote" style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#777;">Click a region on the map to see its full annual series.</p>
    <table id="seriesTable" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.8rem;"></table>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const CM_COMP   = '../data/mortality/child_mortality_comp.csv';
const CM_BYPROV = '../data/mortality/child_mortality_comp_byprov.csv';
// boundary geojsons actually present on disk
const COMP_GEO_YEARS = [1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931, 1936];
const PROV_GEO_YEARS = [1861, 1871, 1881, 1901, 1911, 1921, 1931, 1936];
const COLORS = ['#fff7ec','#fee8c8','#fdd49e','#fdbb84','#fc8d59','#ef6548','#d7301f','#990000'];
const DEFAULT_YEAR = 1901;

// data[comp][year] = {births, deaths_u5, u5mr};   byprov[cod][year] = u5mr
let data = {}, byprov = {}, YEARS = [], geoCache = {};
let currentLayer = null, currentBreaks = null, selected = null;

const map = L.map('map', {zoomControl:false, attributionControl:false, dragging:false,
  scrollWheelZoom:false, doubleClickZoom:false, boxZoom:false, keyboard:false,
  touchZoom:false}).setView([41.5, 12.5], 6);

const getYear = () => YEARS[+document.getElementById('yearSlider').value];
const fnum = v => (v === '' || v == null) ? null : +v;
const nearest = (year, list) =>
  list.reduce((b, y) => Math.abs(y - year) < Math.abs(b - year) ? y : b, list[0]);

async function loadData() {
  const [c, p] = await Promise.all([
    fetch(CM_COMP).then(r => r.text()),
    fetch(CM_BYPROV).then(r => r.text())
  ]);
  const yearSet = new Set();
  Papa.parse(c, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!r.compartimento || !r.year) return;
    const y = +r.year;
    yearSet.add(y);
    (data[r.compartimento] = data[r.compartimento] || {})[y] =
      {births: fnum(r.births), deaths_u5: fnum(r.deaths_u5), u5mr: fnum(r.u5mr)};
  });
  Papa.parse(p, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true}).data.forEach(function(r) {
    if (!r.COD_PROV || !r.year) return;
    (byprov[+r.COD_PROV] = byprov[+r.COD_PROV] || {})[+r.year] = fnum(r.u5mr);
  });
  YEARS = [...yearSet].sort((a, b) => a - b);
}

// u5mr for a compartimento name in a year
const compU5 = (name, year) => ((data[name] || {})[year] || {}).u5mr ?? null;

function computeBreaks() {
  const year = getYear();
  const values = Object.keys(data)
    .map(name => compU5(name, year)).filter(v => v != null)
    .sort((a, b) => a - b);
  if (!values.length) return [0, 1];
  const breaks = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++)
    breaks.push(values[Math.min(Math.floor(values.length * i / 8), values.length - 1)]);
  return [...new Set(breaks)].sort((a, b) => a - b);
}

function getColor(v, breaks) {
  if (v == null) return '#e5e7eb';
  for (let i = breaks.length - 1; i >= 0; i--)
    if (v > breaks[i]) return COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
  return COLORS[0];
}

// resolve a feature (compartimento OR province) to its u5mr for the current year
function featureU5(props) {
  const year = getYear();
  if (props.COMP != null) return compU5(props.COMP, year);
  if (props.COD_PROV != null) return (byprov[+props.COD_PROV] || {})[year] ?? null;
  return null;
}
function featureName(props) {
  return props.COMP != null ? props.COMP : (props.DEN_PROV || ('prov ' + props.COD_PROV));
}

function style(feature) {
  return {fillColor: getColor(featureU5(feature.properties), currentBreaks),
          weight: 0.7, opacity: 1, color: '#94a3b8', fillOpacity: 0.85};
}

function tooltipHtml(props) {
  const year = getYear();
  const f0 = x => x == null ? '—' : Math.round(x).toLocaleString('en-US');
  if (props.COMP != null) {
    const rec = (data[props.COMP] || {})[year];
    if (!rec) return '<strong>' + props.COMP + '</strong><br>no data ' + year;
    return '<strong>' + props.COMP + '</strong> — ' + year +
      '<br>u5mr ' + (rec.u5mr != null ? rec.u5mr.toFixed(1) : '—') + ' ‰' +
      '<br>births ' + f0(rec.births) + ' · deaths 0–4 ' + f0(rec.deaths_u5);
  }
  // province polygon (region value spread onto provinces)
  const v = (byprov[+props.COD_PROV] || {})[year];
  return '<strong>' + (props.DEN_PROV || props.COD_PROV) + '</strong> — ' + year +
    '<br>u5mr (region) ' + (v != null ? v.toFixed(1) + ' ‰' : '—');
}

function onEachFeature(feature, layer) {
  const props = feature.properties;
  layer.bindTooltip(() => tooltipHtml(props), {sticky: true});
  layer.on({
    mouseover: function(e) { e.target.setStyle({weight: 2, color: '#7f0000', fillOpacity: 1}); e.target.bringToFront(); },
    mouseout: function(e) { if (currentLayer) currentLayer.resetStyle(e.target); },
    click: function() {
      if (props.COMP != null) { selected = props.COMP; showComp(); }
    }
  });
}

function showComp() {
  const year = getYear();
  const el = document.getElementById('compInfo');
  if (!selected) {
    document.getElementById('compName').textContent = 'Pick a compartimento';
    document.getElementById('compTable').innerHTML = '';
    document.getElementById('seriesTable').innerHTML = '';
    document.getElementById('seriesNote').textContent =
      'Click a region on the map to see its full annual series.';
    return;
  }
  const rec = (data[selected] || {})[year];
  document.getElementById('compName').textContent = selected + ' — ' + year;
  const f0 = x => x == null ? '—' : Math.round(x).toLocaleString('en-US');
  document.getElementById('compTable').innerHTML = rec
    ? '<tr><td>u5mr (per 1,000)</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:bold;">' +
        (rec.u5mr != null ? rec.u5mr.toFixed(1) : '—') + '</td></tr>' +
      '<tr><td>live births</td><td style="text-align:right;">' + f0(rec.births) + '</td></tr>' +
      '<tr><td>deaths age 0–4</td><td style="text-align:right;">' + f0(rec.deaths_u5) + '</td></tr>'
    : '<tr><td colspan="2">no data ' + year + '</td></tr>';
  document.getElementById('seriesNote').textContent = '';
  const series = data[selected] || {};
  let head = '<tr style="border-bottom:2px solid #ccc;"><th style="text-align:left;">year</th>' +
    ['u5mr','births','deaths 0–4'].map(h => '<th style="text-align:right;">' + h + '</th>').join('') + '</tr>';
  let body = YEARS.map(function(y) {
    const r = series[y];
    const cur = y === year ? ' style="background:#fde2d2;font-weight:bold;"' : '';
    if (!r) return '<tr' + cur + '><td>' + y + '</td><td colspan="3" style="text-align:right;color:#999;">—</td></tr>';
    return '<tr' + cur + '><td>' + y + '</td><td style="text-align:right;">' +
      (r.u5mr != null ? r.u5mr.toFixed(1) : '—') + '</td><td style="text-align:right;">' +
      f0(r.births) + '</td><td style="text-align:right;">' + f0(r.deaths_u5) + '</td></tr>';
  }).join('');
  document.getElementById('seriesTable').innerHTML = head + body;
}

async function fetchGeo(year) {
  // prefer a compartimento boundary if one is close enough (<=5y); else provinces
  const cy = nearest(year, COMP_GEO_YEARS);
  const useComp = Math.abs(cy - year) <= 5;
  const py = nearest(year, PROV_GEO_YEARS);
  const kind = useComp ? 'compartimento' : 'province';
  const gy = useComp ? cy : py;
  const key = kind + '_' + gy;
  if (!geoCache[key])
    geoCache[key] = await fetch('../data/geojson/' + key + '.geojson').then(r => r.json());
  return {geo: geoCache[key], kind, gy};
}

async function updateMap() {
  const year = getYear();
  document.getElementById('yearDisplay').textContent = year;
  const {geo, kind, gy} = await fetchGeo(year);
  currentBreaks = computeBreaks();
  if (currentLayer) map.removeLayer(currentLayer);
  currentLayer = L.geoJSON(geo, {style: style, onEachFeature: onEachFeature}).addTo(map);
  map.fitBounds(currentLayer.getBounds(), {padding: [10, 10]});
  document.getElementById('boundaryNote').textContent =
    'Boundaries: ' + kind + ' ' + gy + (gy === year ? '' : ' (nearest available)');
  updateLegend();
  showComp();
}

function updateLegend() {
  const div = document.getElementById('legendContent');
  if (!div || !currentBreaks) return;
  let html = '<strong>u5mr (per 1,000 births)</strong>';
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + COLORS[0] + '"></i><span>&lt; ' + currentBreaks[0].toFixed(0) + '</span></div>';
  for (let i = 0; i < currentBreaks.length; i++) {
    const next = currentBreaks[i + 1];
    const clr = COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
    html += next
      ? '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>' + currentBreaks[i].toFixed(0) + '–' + next.toFixed(0) + '</span></div>'
      : '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>&gt; ' + currentBreaks[i].toFixed(0) + '</span></div>';
  }
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:#e5e7eb"></i><span>no data</span></div>';
  html += '<div id="boundaryNote" style="margin-top:0.4rem;font-size:0.75rem;color:#888;"></div>';
  div.innerHTML = html;
}

function init() {
  const slider = document.getElementById('yearSlider');
  slider.max = YEARS.length - 1;
  slider.value = Math.max(0, YEARS.indexOf(DEFAULT_YEAR));
  document.getElementById('yearTicks').innerHTML =
    YEARS.map((y, i) => '<span>' + (i % 5 === 0 ? y : '·') + '</span>').join('');
  slider.addEventListener('input', updateMap);
  document.getElementById('legendToggle').addEventListener('click', function() {
    const hidden = document.getElementById('legendWrapper').classList.toggle('legend-hidden');
    this.textContent = hidden ? 'Show' : 'Hide';
  });
  updateMap();
}

loadData().then(init);
</script>

<div style="margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid #ddd;font-size:0.9rem;color:#555;">
<p><strong>Method.</strong> The under-5 mortality rate (u5mr) is computed as
deaths of children aged 0–4 divided by live births in the same year and
compartimento, per 1,000. Live births and under-5 deaths are taken from the
manual compilation of <strong>M. Raftakis</strong>, drawn from the ISTAT
<em>Movimento dello stato civile</em>. Romagna is summed back into Emilia and
Zara into Venezia Giulia e Zara; for sheets reporting sexes separately, deaths
are the sum of males and females. Only years passing a plausibility filter are
shown: the year is kept when the aggregate ratio (total under-5 deaths / total
births) lies between 0.10 and 0.45 (u5mr 100–450 ‰); years that report total
deaths (e.g. 1871) or are empty (1891–1894) are excluded.</p>
<p>The map draws each compartimento by its own u5mr on the historical region
boundaries for the nearest available benchmark; for intercensal years without a
region polygon, the value is spread onto the provinces of each compartimento and
the province boundaries are shaded instead. Coverage of <strong>Venezia
Tridentina</strong> and <strong>Venezia Giulia e Zara</strong> begins only in the
1920s–1930s, matching the source.</p>
<p><strong>Validation.</strong> For 1901, 1911, 1931 and 1936 the Raftakis
under-5 deaths were checked against our own ISTAT age-by-sex extraction
(sum of ages 0–4 from <em>deaths_comp_agesex_{year}.csv</em>): 1901, 1911 and
1936 match exactly across all tabulated compartimenti, and 1931 matches on 17 of
18 (Sardegna differs by 50, a manual-transcription rounding in the source).</p>
<p><strong>Data:</strong> M. Raftakis (manual extraction).
<a href="../data/mortality/child_mortality_comp.csv" download>child_mortality_comp.csv</a>
(compartimento × year: births, under-5 deaths, u5mr) ·
<a href="../data/mortality/child_mortality_comp_byprov.csv" download>child_mortality_comp_byprov.csv</a>
(region u5mr projected onto provinces, for the map).</p>
<p>Preliminary — test environment.</p>
</div>
```
